channel.title: CyberNetSec - Cyberattack
channel.description: Latest cyberattack threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Pro-Iranian Group 'Handala' Claims 'Warning' Attack on California Water Systems
item.description:
The pro-Iranian hacktivist group 'Handala' has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack against California water infrastructure. The group framed the intrusion as a retaliatory 'warning' to the U.S. for alleged strikes on Iranian water resources. While Handala asserted it did not disrupt water suppl...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Threat Actor, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Oracle Rushes Emergency Patch for PeopleSoft Zero-Day Exploited by ShinyHunters
item.description:
Oracle has released an emergency, out-of-band patch for a critical unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) zero-day vulnerability in its PeopleSoft PeopleTools software, tracked as CVE-2026-35273. The urgent release follows confirmation that the flaw is being actively exploited in the wild by th...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Threat Actor, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Novo Nordisk Confirms Data Breach, Urges Vigilance from Trial Participants
item.description:
Danish pharmaceutical company Novo Nordisk announced on June 11, 2026, that it suffered a cybersecurity incident where attackers gained unauthorized access to internal IT systems. The company confirmed that personal data related to some clinical trial participants was accessed. While Novo Nordisk st...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Data Breach, Cyberattack, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: Vietnam's OceanLotus APT Pivots to Domestic Spying, Hits Construction and Finance Sectors
item.description:
The Vietnam-aligned threat group OceanLotus (also known as APT32) has shifted its focus to domestic espionage, targeting a Vietnamese construction firm and stock market investors. According to research from ESET, the group conducted a year-long intrusion and a sophisticated supply-chain attack compr...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Supply Chain Attack, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Jamaica's National Health Fund Probes Cyberattack as Hackers Claim Patient Data Theft
item.description:
Jamaica's National Health Fund (NHF) is conducting an active investigation into a cybersecurity incident after being contacted by a hacker group. The unidentified group claims to have breached the NHF's systems and stolen highly confidential patient data, including medication records and beneficiary...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Data Breach, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Russian APTs Persistently Exploit Year-Old WinRAR Flaw in Attacks on Ukraine
item.description:
A high-severity vulnerability in WinRAR, CVE-2025-8088, patched nearly a year ago, is still being actively exploited by multiple Russian-linked APT groups against targets in Ukraine. According to Trend Micro, the Gamaredon (UAC-0010) and SHADOW-EARTH-066 (UAC-0226) groups are using the flaw to deliv...

Severity: High

Categories: Vulnerability, Threat Actor, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Microsoft's Record-Breaking June Patch Tuesday: Over 200 Flaws and Three Zero-Days Patched
item.description:
Microsoft has released its largest-ever Patch Tuesday for June 2026, addressing a staggering 200 vulnerabilities across its product ecosystem. The update includes fixes for 33 critical flaws and three publicly disclosed zero-day vulnerabilities. Among the most severe are a wormable Windows Kernel RC...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Patch Management, Vulnerability, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Energy Sector in Crosshairs: 66% of APT Campaigns Target Utilities, Report Finds
item.description:
A new intelligence report from CYFIRMA reveals a concentrated and sustained cyber espionage campaign against the global energy and utilities sector. Over the past three months, this critical infrastructure sector was the target in 66% of all observed Advanced Persistent Threat (APT) campaigns. The m...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Ransomware Attack on Illinois High School Disables Safety Systems, Forcing Campus Shutdown
item.description:
A ransomware attack on June 7, 2026, forced Evanston Township High School (ETHS) in Illinois to shut down its campus for two days. The cyberattack had a severe physical impact, disabling critical building safety systems including door access controls and public address systems, rendering the school ...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Wave of Data Breaches Hits Global Firms as Multiple Threat Actors Strike
item.description:
June 10, 2026, saw a flurry of data breach announcements with multiple threat actor groups claiming responsibility for attacks on a diverse set of global companies. The victims span telecommunications, IT, manufacturing, logistics, and finance. U.S. telecom company AireSpring was allegedly hit by 'C...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →
